title: Bulk County Preparation Orchestrator
mission: Know Before You Go — Awareness Platform First, Route Intelligence Second

discoveredTools.name: Census boundary source inventory
discoveredTools.purpose: Discover whether a canonical county boundary source is already staged.

discoveredTools.name: County boundary validation harness
discoveredTools.purpose: Validate county boundary artifacts when they exist; does not activate counties.

discoveredTools.name: Community package inventory
discoveredTools.purpose: Detect existing community package manifests before any build step.

discoveredTools.name: Crossing package inventory
discoveredTools.purpose: Detect existing county crossing packages before any derivation step.

discoveredTools.name: FRA Texas inventory source
discoveredTools.purpose: Use the staged FRA inventory as the source for future county-contained crossing package derivation.

discoveredTools.name: V812 county readiness gap resolver
discoveredTools.purpose: Recalculate blocked-county gaps without runtime activation.

discoveredTools.name: V813 county preparation planner
discoveredTools.purpose: Refresh preparation tiers and manual-action recommendations.

discoveredTools.name: Runtime registration mutation
discoveredTools.purpose: Protected runtime registration remains blocked by V815.

toolsThatWillBeInvoked.name: Census boundary source inventory
toolsThatWillBeInvoked.purpose: Discover whether a canonical county boundary source is already staged.

toolsThatWillBeInvoked.name: County boundary validation harness
toolsThatWillBeInvoked.purpose: Validate county boundary artifacts when they exist; does not activate counties.

toolsThatWillBeInvoked.purpose: Recalculate blocked-county gaps without runtime activation.

toolsThatWillBeInvoked.name: V813 county preparation planner
toolsThatWillBeInvoked.purpose: Refresh preparation tiers and manual-action recommendations.

toolsThatWillBeInvoked.name: V814 automation capability audit
toolsThatWillBeInvoked.purpose: Refresh build-tool capability classification.

manualWorkStillRequired.requiredWork: Acquire, extract, validate, and promote a county-owned boundary to assets/county-implementation/harris/boundary/harris-county-boundary.geojson under V809/V810 canonical boundary rules.
Prepare a runtime boundary registration only after the canonical boundary source is present and validated; do not activate the county.
Future separate approval must prepare non-operational runtime registration; V815 never edits runtime registration or activates counties.

manualWorkStillRequired.requiredWork: Acquire, extract, validate, and promote a county-owned boundary to assets/county-implementation/walker/boundary/walker-county-boundary.geojson under V809/V810 canonical boundary rules.
Prepare a runtime boundary registration only after the canonical boundary source is present and validated; do not activate the county.
Future separate approval must prepare non-operational runtime registration; V815 never edits runtime registration or activates counties.
